feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should auto approve
entry.content:
We have problem with approval of service entry sheets.
The SES should auto approve but after sending for approval they remain in status 'In Approval' (20) .

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Problem to connect Business Application Studio to S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have done a RAP Application (and apparently, it's necessary to go throw BAS to end the Building of the App for the deployment and the end of the process).
I try to connect my system to Business application studio in order to deploy a Rap application to S/4 Public Cloud (and not BTP)

I was following the tutorial Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System | SAP Tutorials

And in the step 4, I have an error Certificate cannot be saved in Address Book.

I check my roles in Development environment.
We are in 3 system landscape.

Christophe

entry.title: Billing blocks for cancelled deliveries in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with canceled delivery notes. They appear in the billing list - VF04. In order to not be invoiced and use up the fiscal numbers,we tried to use billing blocks on deliveries but they still appear in billing list. How to handle this case in public cloud? Have we any solution like VL_COMPLETE in public cloud?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Schedule OverView (Capacity Planning) Reddening, even though there is no overlap
entry.content:
Hi.

I dont Understand... 

Reddening, even though there is no overlap

Why is this?

What are the possible causes?

please tell me…

entry.title: Is there bulk Create, bulk Copying of BOM? in SAP S/4hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi

 

None of the above.

Do I have to register and copy each one?

Can't we have more than one?

entry.title: Work Agreement API in S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

We would like to fetch the data from Work Agreement app, epecially we want to get the value of Manager of the Employee and Cost Center of the Employee. Is there any ways to get those fields via API or something else?

Regards,

Ei

entry.title: BAPI / Simulate API alternative for BAPI: BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a requirement to mass create and mass change the price condition data for configurable materials by uploading Excel file, we want to run a simulate/test run before committing the the change/create.

In ECC there is a BAPI : 'BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS'  for create/change and we could commit or rollback the changes once its executed, similarly is there any alternative BAPI or Simulate API for create/change pricing condition before the POST/PUT call in SAP Public cloud.

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Supply Chain API

entry.title: How to extract the PO Long Text from Material Master in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
We are in need of the CDS view to create the report for Material Long description which is stored in the material master view "Purchase order Text". This information is very essential for our day-to-day operations.

Your earliest action on this will be highly appreciated.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Import Sales Order Application does not support documents Type CR/DR
entry.content:
We are utilizing the "Import sales order" application to generate multiple sales orders.

Upon attempting to upload credit/debit memo requests, we receive an error message indicating that the request is "Invalid."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create Notification Inside SAP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to create notifications to other user inside SAP. For example : When a maintenance request created , the notification will send to other user who is responsible to accept or reject the maintenance request on the app Screen Maintenance Request.

Other example : if maintenance order released on the system & have some material to be consume, a notification will be send to warehouse clerk so they know to prepare the material.

How to create a notification inside the SAP to another user ?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Purchase Order Numbering based on Plant
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our customer have requirement that , the numbering of PO is based on the plant item.

We already configure for the purchase order type based on the plant , and the numbering for each plant is set differently.

Does the system allow if the plant on the purchase order is 02 then the purchase order type will be 02, and if the plant on the purchase order is 3 then there purchase order type will be 03?

Is it possible to configure that way?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: What happens when I register a PRT? in SAP S/4HANA Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi

What happens when I register a PRT?

PRTs just change to YES? in Manage Production Orders

Does「Scheduled Start」 or 「Scheduled End」ever change?

I don't know what SAP can do for me if I register a PRT.

entry.title: Auto Technical Complete for Production Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Can we create auto technical complete for production order that already been overdue based on the schedule ? for example if a production order on the schedule is finished on 17th January , on 18th January the production will be auto technical complete.

Is it possible?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing

entry.title: Enhancement in Confirm Production Order Operation (CO11N) application in Public Cloud
entry.content: In the SAP Public Cloud, on the Production Order Confirmation screen (CO11n), we require a feature that allows us to define fields for maintaining the minimum and maximum values for each quantity. It would be helpful if we could click a button to open a sheet, similar to Excel, where these values can be entered. Additionally, we would like to be able to view reports or history for these entries at a later time. Is it possible to implement such an enhancement or customization within the public cloud?                                                                                        Its quite urgent, please help.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Change UI when Creating Supplier Master
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to change the UI when creating a supplier master data 

We want to remove business partner field because we are using internal numbering. But we unable to delete the field , we only can delete the column. Is there any work around so we can delete only the business partner field?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Quality certificates issue with printing for different form templates
entry.content:
In output management two different CoA form templates were created and the changes were connected in CBC to appropriate output type.

In output parameter determination app on determination step for form template, the same change was made – forms were linked to Quality certificate output type. The changes were properly checked and activated.

During the creation of CoA in app Manage Quality Certificates for inspection lots there is no possibility to choose which form I print at the moment, system always choose the same form.

Please could anyone help if there is some step I have predicted or confirm if there is no possibility in system to carry the mentioned action.

 

Thanks!

Anita

entry.title: Character length issue in PM - General Maintenance Task List template- Field PLNNR
entry.content:
How to resolve the issue where the 'Key for Task List Group' field in the 'Task List Header' sheet of the 'Source Data for PM - General Maintenance Task List Template' is only accepting up to 8 characters, even though it is specified to allow up to 80 characters?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4C Public Edition TDD
entry.content:
Dear All,

is  joule available for S4C Public Edition TDD?

in Global account I cannot find joule foundation, how to enable this?

Please guide,

thanks you

ebsor

entry.title: How to retrieve the PAN details of a business partner via a CDS view?
entry.content:
How to retrieve the PAN details of a business partner via a CDS view?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts not having option to add co code and G/L account
entry.content: "Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts" not having option to add co code and G/L account in "Schedule Accounting Data Changes" app in test and prod environment. The G/L account has been updated to OIM account in Customizing. However, when I try to run it in Test environment, there is no option to add parameters for company code and G/L accounts.
